events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need produce exactly one valid JSON object, no prose outside, no markdown code blocks. Must fill all required fields. Scenario: heavy industrial I&C calibration, 5-point cal skipped (hysteresis missed), roughed in, installed-defective possible. Need estimate measurable condition and why out of tolerance. The measurable cue visible enough. Need decision fail if non-compliant. Risk? high? Skipped calibration could lead to control loop errors, safety. critical? In heavy industrial, calibration skipped on instrument could be critical if used for safety/interlock, but generic calibration failure maybe high. But instructions: dangerous or non-compliant => fail. Risk maybe high. work_stage rough-complete. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete estimate maybe 65 or 70. value numeric reading? We don't have numeric reading; can set 0 maybe or use number of points? Task says use value for numeric reading or computed quantity when the task asks for one. It asks estimate or interpret measurable condition. Could use 0 because no measured value; but maybe represent missing hysteresis error as unmeasured deviation. We can set value: 0 (no valid calibration reading available). confidence 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, sound_source "" or "N/A". order empty list. workable empty list. findings: "5-point calibration not performed", "hysteresis testing omitted", "instrument not verified per ISA/site QC". actions: "reject and tag instrument out of service", "perform full 5-point calibration including ascending and descending hysteresis checks", "document as-found/as-left data", "notify QC/inspection". rationale brief. references: "ISA standards; site QC plan".

Need ensure JSON only. Provide no markdown.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": [
    "installed-defective",
    "non-compliant"
  ],
  "percent_complete": 65,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "N/A",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "5-point calibration was skipped",
    "Hysteresis (ascending/descending) check was omitted",
    "Instrument accuracy and repeatability are unverified",
    "Work does not meet ISA calibration or site QC requirements"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Red-tag instrument and remove from service until calibrated",
    "Perform complete 5-point calibration including hysteresis loop",
    "Record as-found and as-left data per site QC procedure",
    "Submit calibration certificate for inspection hold-point release"
  ],
  "rationale": "A skipped 5-point calibration with no hysteresis check means the instrument's accuracy, linearity, and repeatability are unknown. Under ISA standards and site QC, an uncalibrated I&C device in a heavy-industrial process is out of tolerance and non-compliant; it cannot be accepted or placed in service.",
  "references": [
    "ISA standards",
    "site QC"
  ]
}
